text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Vision Matters: Simple Visual Perturbations Can Boost Multimodal Math Reasoning" is real and was published on arXiv as arXiv:2506.09736v1 on June 12, 2025, with the exact 7-author list cited (Yuting Li, Lai Wei, Kaipeng Zheng, Jingyuan Huang, Linghe Kong, Lichao Sun, Weiran Huang). The automated checker's "mismatches" reflect a later revised version (v2, September 2025) that added two authors and changed the title; the original v1 matches the cited reference precisely.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.09736
